race.comment: CHECKS'N'BALANCES (2) finished out of the money two starts back then ran eighth over 1250m at Newcastle two-and-a-half weeks ago. Finds a more suitable contest and can get the job done. MOONLIGHT ODYSSEY (8) ran a better race last start to finish a close second over 1300m at Binnaway after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Steps up a level but he is worth serious consideration. PERCOLATE (5) returns from a spell of seven months and is having her first run for a new yard. Finished fourth at Hawkesbury over 1000m when first-up last time in work. Ran sixth in a recent trial over 1000m at Wyong. Well-placed and is among the chances. BE MORE PACIFIC (3) could only manage to finish fourth at his latest appearance over 1200m at Coffs Harbour. Expected to feature in the finish this time.
